description: One-shot request that invalidates the current cache and rebuilds it from the latest synced data.

cache_key.description: Stable replay cache key to rebuild.
cache_key.title: Cache Key

instrument_symbol.description: Instrument symbol for the replay window.
instrument_symbol.title: Instrument Symbol

chart_instance_id.description: Optional ATAS chart-instance filter when multiple charts for the same symbol are running.
chart_instance_id.title: Chart Instance Id

min_continuous_messages.description: Minimum number of local continuous-state messages required before local-history rebuild is allowed.
min_continuous_messages.title: Min Continuous Messages

invalidation_reason.default: operator requested rebuild from latest synced data
invalidation_reason.description: Reason stored on the invalidated cache record before rebuilding.
invalidation_reason.title: Invalidation Reason

title: ReplayWorkbenchRebuildLatestRequest
